name: how-to-write-component
tagline: Decision guide for React/TypeScript component architecture, state ownership, and Dify UI conventions in Dify web.
verdict: Pure prose coding-convention guide with no commands, network calls, or security exposure. Highly actionable with explicit defaults for most forks. Gaps: no stated out-of-scope cases despite being a broad guide, one bespoke pattern (satisfies Hotkey/RawHotkey) lacks a worked example, the single 23KB file sits near the size budget with clearly separable.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope statement anywhere despite a broad description spanning many decision areas.
23KB single SKILL.md near the size budget with clearly separable topics (Jotai, Hotkeys, Queries, Overlays) kept inline, no reference files.
The 'satisfies Hotkey' / 'satisfies RawHotkey' command pattern is required but never shown as a worked code example.
